name: P2000 | 廉价皮革
descriptionEn: Accurate and controllable, the German-made P2000 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents. It has been painted with a plaid hydrographic and parts of the grip have been wrapped in brown leather. It's not fancy, but it gets you where you need to go
descriptionZh: 精准、可控，这把德国制造的耐用第一回合手枪非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手。 这把武器使用格子呢花纹进行了涂装，枪的部分用棕色皮革包裹。 虽然很普通，但至少发挥了基本的作用
